posts.author: sivaprakashh
posts.community: Influx HealthTech ( SME ) B2B CDMO For nutraceuticals, cosmetics, ayurvedic products, veterinary feed supplements
posts.text: https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/INFLUX_20052026154241_200526IHLOutcomeofBMSigned.pdf Financial Performance Influx H2FY26 sales grew 41% YoY to 80 Cr (FY26 sales grew by 40% YoY to 147 Cr) → In line with management guidance. EBITDA margin reduced by 300 bps in H2FY26 (compared to H1FY26) due to raw material price volatility & new hirings. PAT increased by 38% YoY in H2 (FY26 PAT grew by 54% YoY). Nutraceutical segment grew by 40% YoY, Ayurvedic segment by 89% YoY, Cosmetics segment by 16% YoY & Veterinary Feed Supplements & Homecare segment by 57% YoY in FY26. Other Updates Invested…
